search.query: index=lambda_logs dbclusteridentifier=$form.dbclusteridentifier$ dbinstanceidentifier=$form.dbinstanceidentifier$ type=summary | rename relname AS "table name", hot_updates AS "hot updates", live_tuples AS "live tuples", dead_tuples AS "dead tuples" | dedup "table name" sortby -"_time" | table "table name", inserts, updates, deletes, "hot updates", "live tuples", "dead tuples"

index=lambda_logs dbclusteridentifier=$form.dbclusteridentifier$ dbinstanceidentifier=$form.dbinstanceidentifier$ type=summary NOT (last_vacuum=None AND last_analyze=None AND last_autoanalyze=None AND last_autovacuum=None) | dedup last_vacuum,last_analyze,last_autoanalyze,last_autovacuum | rename relname AS "table name" | head 20 | eval analyze=strftime(last_analyze,"%m/%d/%y %H:%M:%S") | eval autoanalyze=strftime(last_autoanalyze,"%m/%d/%y %H:%M:%S") | eval vacuum=strftime(last_vacuum,"%m/%d/%y %H:%M:%S") | eval autovacuum=strftime(last_autovacuum,"%m/%d/%y %H:%M:%S") | table "table name", "analyze", "autoanalyze", "vacuum", "autovacuum"

index=lambda_logs dbclusteridentifier=$form.dbclusteridentifier$ dbinstanceidentifier=$form.dbinstanceidentifier$ type=top_sql | dedup sql_text | sort -avg_time | head 5 | table sql_text, avg_time, num_execs, avg_pio_time, avg_cpu_n_wait_time,avg_lio, avg_pio, avg_disksort_wrt, avg_disksort_reads, avg_rows, max_time, pct_tot_time, pct_pio_time, pct_cpu_n_wait_time

index=lambda_logs dbclusteridentifier=$form.dbclusteridentifier$ dbinstanceidentifier=$form.dbinstanceidentifier$ type=unused_indexes| dedup relname, indexrelname | rename relname AS "table", indexrelname AS "index" | table "table", "index"
index=lambda_logs dbclusteridentifier=$form.dbclusteridentifier$ type=extension_list | dedup extname, extver | rename extname AS name, extver AS version | table name, version
index=lambda_logs dbclusteridentifier=$form.dbclusteridentifier$ type type=qpm_data | stats count by status, enabled

index=lambda_logs dbclusteridentifier=$form.dbclusteridentifier$ type=table_bloat | rename schema_name AS "schema name", table_name AS "table name", bloat_pct AS "bloat %", bloat_mb AS "bloat mb", table_mb AS "table mb" | dedup "table name" sortby -"_time" | table "table name", "schema name", "bloat %", "bloat mb", "table mb"

index=lambda_logs dbclusteridentifier=$form.dbclusteridentifier$ type=index_bloat | rename schema_name AS "schema name", table_name AS "table name", index_name AS "index name", bloat_pct AS "bloat %", bloat_mb AS "bloat mb", table_mb AS "table mb", index_mb AS "index mb", index_scans AS "index scans" | dedup "table name" sortby -"_time" | table "table name", "schema name", "index name", "bloat %", "bloat mb", "table mb", "index mb", "index scans"
